title: Traditional Italian Pudding
description: A classic Italian-inspired dessert made with a delicate balance of sweet and savory flavors. Yorkshire pudding serves as the base for a creamy custard.
instructions: 2. Place the Yorkshire pudding on a baking sheet.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the heavy cream, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes or until it thickens slightly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the cinnamon and butter until melted.
7. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs.
8. Pour the warm cream mixture into the bowl with the eggs and whisk until smooth.
9. Pour the custard mixture over the Yorkshire pudding.
10. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the custard is set and lightly golden brown.
